title: Europe Tries a Trumpian Tactic With Trump: No Apologies
summary_full: Stuck with the fallout from America’s war in Iran, European leaders have criticized the president publicly. When he’s been angered, they haven’t backed down.
summary_public: Stuck with the fallout from America’s war in Iran, European leaders have criticized the president publicly. When he’s been angered, they haven’t backed down.

IR.label: neutral
